statement.en: Évaluation de la vélocimétrie par images de particules In-Line pour les mesures de turbulence dans les milieux poreux

proposer: A Mure d'Alexis, O Léon, D Donjat et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a future-dated preprint (April 2026) describing an experimental methodology for particle image velocimetry (PIV) in porous media turbulence measurement. As a provisional technical contribution not yet peer-reviewed or validated, it carries FLOWING status. The core claims (PIV applicability to porous media, turbulence quantification feasibility) are empirically testable but not yet established in this specific configuration.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 孔隙の中で、粒子の揺らぎは層を通して時間の逆数として踊る。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 光が孔隙の迷宮を貫き、粒子は波紋のように共鳴する。
